project_type: Android app (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Hilt DI, llama.cpp JNI)
build_system: Gradle with Kotlin DSL (build.gradle.kts). AGP 8.2.2, Kotlin 1.9.22, Hilt 2.50.
test_framework: JUnit 4 for unit tests, AndroidJUnit with Compose UI testing for instrumented tests. No tests currently exist.
verification_instructions: Run ./gradlew assembleDebug to confirm the app compiles with the new OkHttp dependency and the real download implementation.
setup_instructions: Project uses Gradle wrapper. Run ./gradlew assembleDebug from project root.
environment_constraints: Open internet access available. Android project requires Android SDK - Gradle build may or may not succeed in sandbox depending on SDK availability. AST/syntax validation may be needed as fallback.
key_patterns: Repository pattern with Hilt DI. AIModelRepositoryImpl implements AIModelRepository interface. Uses Kotlin Flow for async operations. DownloadState sealed class has Idle, InProgress(progress: Float), Completed(localPath: String), Failed(message: String) states. Models directory at context.filesDir/models/. Hugging Face download URL pattern: https://huggingface.co/{model_id}/resolve/main/{ggufFileName}
directory_structure: Standard Android project: app/src/main/java/com/localai/ with packages: data/repository, data/engine, domain/model, domain/repository, domain/engine, presentation/model, presentation/chat, di. build.gradle.kts at app/ level. AndroidManifest.xml at app/src/main/.
